options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: enable_hints
options.description: Enable revealing the items in adjacent locations when completing an achievement

options.name: production_multiplier
options.description:
Production multiplier, as a power of ten
0 (x1): Vanilla
1/2 (x10/x100): Slightly faster early game
3 (x1000): Suitable for sync (completion in several hours)
4 (x10.000): Suitable for sync (completion in about 1 hour)
5 (x100.000): You can stop now.

options.name: enable_progressive_buildings
options.description:
When enabled, this option makes Synergy upgrades behave like a Unlock Building item.
This mean you get 3x Unlock Building instead of 1x, and subsequent unlocks will
turn into a synergy upgrade instead.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
options: Restaurants at the end of the universe
At your doorstep in 30 minutes or your money back
Some other super-tiny fundamental particle? Probably?
Lab goggles but like cool shades
All Bets Are Off magic coin
The more they stay the same
Kitten assistants to the regional manager

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.
options: Restaurants at the end of the universe
At your doorstep in 30 minutes or your money back
Some other super-tiny fundamental particle? Probably?
Lab goggles but like cool shades
All Bets Are Off magic coin
The more they stay the same

options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: The land of milk and cookies
He who controls the cookies controls the universe
Are you gonna eat all that?
We're gonna need a bigger bakery
Brought to you by the letter
The dreams in which I'm baking are the best I've ever had
I think it's safe to say you've got it made
Not enough of a good thing
Fake it till you bake it
What do you get for the baker who has everything
When this baby hits 36 quadrillion cookies per hour
Cookiehertz : a really, really tasty hertz

There's really no hard limit to how long these achievement names can be and to be quite honest I'm rather curious to see how far we can go.
Adolphus W. Green (1844–1917) started as the Principal of the Groton School in 1864. By 1865, he became second assistant librarian at the New York Mercantile Library; from 1867 to 1869, he was promoted to full librarian. From 1869 to 1873, he worked for Evarts, Southmayd & Choate, a law firm co-founded by William M. Evarts, Charles Ferdinand Southmayd and Joseph Hodges Choate. He was admitted to the New York State Bar Association in 1873.
Anyway, how's your day been?
Well the cookies start coming and they don't stop coming
I don't know if you've noticed but all these icons are very slightly off-center
The proof of the cookie is in the baking
If it's worth doing, it's worth overdoing
What did we even eat before these
Keep going until I say stop
But I didn't say stop, did I?
Speed's the name of the game (no it's not it's called Cookie Clicker)
All the other kids with the pumped up clicks
Ain't that a click in the head
With her finger and her thumb
The old never bothered me anyway
Mountain out of a molehill, but like in a good way
Don't let the walls cave in on you
Save your breath because that's all you've got left
Get the show on, get paid
My world's on fire, how about yours
And I will pray to a big god
The leader is good, the leader is great
And now for my next trick, I'll need a volunteer from the audience
The meteor men beg to differ
You don't think they could've used... it couldn't have been ma-
Too many rabbits, not enough hats
Neither snow nor rain nor heat nor gloom of night
Don't get used to yourself, you're gonna have to change
We could all use a little change
What happens in the vortex stays in the vortex
Objects in the mirror dimension are closer than they appear
Your brain gets smart but your head gets dumb
Not even remotely close to Kansas anymore
cookie clicker forever and forever a hundred years cookie clicker, all day long forever, forever a hundred times, over and over cookie clicker adventures dot com
But the future refused to change
I only meant to stay a while
What's the dark matter with you
At the end of the tunnel
You'll never shine if you don't glow
Now the dark days are gone
Grandma needs a new pair of shoes
Maybe a chance in hell, actually
You'll never know if you don't go
Flip a cookie. Chips, I win. Crust, you lose.
For more information on this achievement, please refer to its title
I'm so meta, even this achievement
Dude what if we're all living in a simulation like what if we're all just code on a computer somewhere
Nobody exists on purpose, nobody belongs anywhere
Don't think about it too hard
By will alone I set my mind in motion
Didn't make sense not to live
When there's nothing left to add
If at first you don't succeed
When the cookies ascend just right
So much to do so much to see

options.name: item_links
